draft.conclusion: 评审结论：存在阻塞问题，请求修改。

findings.problem: The patch checks the path but builds the server-side fetch URL from the request Host header. host ssrf host 内网 host 伪造 forged host host fetch host 可信
findings.evidence: host and x-forwarded-proto are request headers controllable by a client or intermediary; a forged Host (e.g. 127.0.0.1:8080 or an external host) makes the server fetch an internal or attacker-controlled origin. Relative-path safety and origin trust are two separate problems. attacker-controlled x-forwarded-proto
findings.impact: host and x-forwarded-proto are request headers controllable by a client or intermediary; a forged Host (e.g. 127.0.0.1:8080 or an external host) makes the server fetch an internal or attacker-controlled origin. Relative-path safety and origin trust are two separate problems. attacker-controlled x-forwarded-proto
findings.fix: Build the URL from a trusted canonical origin (config), or enforce a host allowlist, before any server-side fetch. server-side canonical

draft.tests: The tests do not cover attacker-controlled Host or X-Forwarded-Host. The added test only asserts a relative path works; the absolute-URL rejection test also passes while the SSRF path (forged host) stays exploitable and untested. 测试 host 测试 x-forwarded-host test host test forged 测试 伪造
